details.test: Task 1: Buy two GA Friday evening tickets under $25 each
Task 2: Enroll in earliest beginner 8-week evening class under $400
Task 3: Buy cheapest premium/front-row ticket under $35
Task 4: Purchase least expensive drop-in pass with >=3 visits under $90
Task 5: Book two events same venue where first ends before second starts
Task 6: Enroll teen in two-week July afternoon camp under $500
Task 7: Purchase $50 digital gift card with birthday design
Task 8: Book three different show performances within same month
Task 9: Submit corporate workshop inquiry for 50-person October event
